svg.text: 38-step orchestrator · 4 novelty gates · 6 feedback loops · epistemic infrastructure (v3)
Fwd/back citation graph · Semantic Scholar API
5 attack types · attempts to kill novelty claim
Concurrent work · arXiv, OpenReview, lab blogs
Baselines · ablations · power analysis · resource estimation
Novelty dimensions covered · baselines complete · metrics aligned
BLOCK → loop back to Step 9 (max 2 iterations)
Data integrity · model loading · metric correctness · ablation sanity · smoke test
Output: docs/validation-report.md | All checks must pass before proceeding to execution
Statistical tests · confidence intervals · scientific figures · hypothesis outcomes
Critical gap → loop back to Step 9 (max 2 iterations)
Re-evaluate novelty given actual results · detect contribution shift
Shift detected → re-run Passes 2+6 · KILL if criteria met
Delta from sweep-1 via watchlist caching
Narrative arc · figure plan · paper blueprint
Evidence missing → loop back to Step 20 or Step 9 (max 1 per direction)
Redesign figures that don't serve their claim
Full prose + Citation Audit · LaTeX source
Novelty · Methodology · Claim-Evidence · Argument · Cross-Section · Presentation · Reproducibility
CRITICAL→BLOCK · dim<5→BLOCK · avg<7→REVISE · partial re-run: --dimensions N,M · Revision cycle ×3
Zotero bridge, synthesis maps, daily notes
projects/<slug>/ {docs, configs, src, data, results/{tables,figures}, manuscript, logs, notebooks, .epistemic/, .cache/}
